untranslatable_reason: Signal requires ADF/KPSS statistical tests for mean-reversion confirmation and half-life calculation (2-10 periods), which are not available in the allowed indicator set. These require specialized econometric analysis beyond standard technical indicators. Substituted with Bollinger Band positioning (bb_pct_b) as a proxy for mean-reversion detection, but this does not replicate the statistical rigor of the original rule.
translation_notes: Used bb_pct_b extremes (<0.15 for long, >0.85 for short) to approximate price deviation from mean, and bb_pct_b reversion to middle band (0.4-0.6) for exit. This is a simplified approximation; the original signal's statistical tests (ADF, KPSS, half-life) cannot be accurately represented with standard technical indicators alone.
